title: 'Picture abhi baaki hai': Iran's Bollywood jab at Trump amid Hormuz blockade; warns missile boats 'warming up'
summary_full: Iran's consulate in Mumbai pushed back on US President Donald Trump's claims of its navy being "finished." Showcasing fast missile boats and referencing a Shah Rukh Khan movie dialogue, Iran warned the US that "the movie is still left," asserting their defense systems remain operational and control over the Strait of Hormuz.
